identity.canonical_title: TZP Extraction Map and Work Gain

theory.canonical_statement: The primordial vacuum is a hyperspherical zero-point field where every point oscillates in phase, forming a boundless higher-dimensional sphere with perfect coherence; signals propagate instantaneously and there is no time.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This support equation moves the entry from the abstract claim toward a concrete first measurable relation.

This normalized closure ties the support terms together and closes the progression under the TRAWIN frame.
